location: Reward from Sorceress Sellen for siding with her against Witch-Hunter Jerren at the climax of her questline, fought at the Raya Lucaria Grand Library.
tactics: Requires committing to Sellen's full questline (helping her research, defeating Radahn to enable her revival, then returning to the Grand Library) rather than siding with Jerren.
At the Grand Library grace, two summon signs appear — the gold sign joins the fight to help Sellen against Jerren; the red sign instead sides with Jerren and locks you out of this dagger.
Siding with Jerren instead nets different rewards (Sellen's Bell Bearing, Witch's Glintstone Crown) — the two paths are mutually exclusive in a single playthrough.
lore: A ceremonial dagger the Academy of Raya Lucaria once gifted to Leyndell to mark a truce between them, its wavy blade and gilded Erdtree filigree referencing an old ritual rather than practical combat design.

builds.name: Intelligence/Dex sorcery dagger
builds.why: D Intelligence and D Dexterity scaling with split physical/magic damage give Intelligence builds a melee option that doesn't waste their stat investment.

builds.name: Glintstone Dart backup nuke
builds.why: Its innate chargeable Glintstone Dart skill gives casters a cheap (10 FP) ranged poke without needing to swap to a staff.
